response.justification: Candidate is an experienced full-stack engineer with strong breadth across TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, and web platforms, but the role demands deep, demonstrated expertise in Java, Kotlin, JVM internals, and the Spring ecosystem. Java appears only briefly (robotic arms, mobile orchestration tool ~2016-2018) with no Kotlin, Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate, or IDE/language-tooling experience evidenced. The closest adjacent work is C/C++ on NI LabWindows IDE (2014-2015), which is too dated and not JVM-focused.
strengths: Strong systems and full-stack experience across multiple languages and platforms
Prior exposure to IDE/tooling work at National Instruments (LabWindows/CVI)
Track record of building developer tooling, test runners, and frameworks (Trial, Fluent-Asserts)
concerns: No demonstrated Spring/Quarkus/Hibernate or enterprise JVM framework experience
No Kotlin experience and only superficial, dated Java exposure
Recent work is centered on TypeScript/Node.js and AI tooling, not JVM internals

key_factors.factor: Lack of Spring/JVM enterprise framework experience
No Kotlin and minimal Java depth
